title: eurya theoides
intro: Eurya theoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae, commonly known as the Taiwan swamp dogwood. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eurya theoides include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Eurya theoides include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tonics, or added to herbal remedies for various health conditions.
